cases.title: Datapack enabled
cases.objective: Confirm Alloys.zip is loaded.
preconditions: World restarted after zip replace (not only /reload)
input: Command: /datapack list
steps: Run the command in chat or console.
expect: file/Alloys.zip listed as enabled
mustNot: Alloys missing or disabled

cases.title: No gear recipe parse errors
cases.objective: Server accepted all alloys:* gear recipes.
preconditions: World restarted after zip replace (not only /reload)
input: Server console log around datapack enable / world start
steps: Search console for alloys: and Failed to parse.
expect: Zero parse failures for alloys:* gear recipes
mustNot: Map entry … Failed to parse either (items+components keys)

cases.title: Recipe register probe
cases.objective: A known gear recipe is registered.
preconditions: World restarted after zip replace (not only /reload)
input: /recipe give @s alloys:astral_helmet
steps: Run the command as the test player.
expect: Success or already unlocked
mustNot: Unknown recipe

cases.title: Astral kit + unlocks
cases.objective: Give kit and sync unlocks work.
preconditions: World restarted after zip replace (not only /reload)
input: /function alloys:give/astral
/function alloys:player/sync_unlocks
expect: Astral kit items present
Astral gear recipes available to craft
mustNot: Empty kit
Gear recipes still locked with kit in hand

cases.title: Happy path — Astral helmet
cases.objective: Alloy ingredients → named Astral Helmet after resolve.
preconditions: World restarted after zip replace (not only /reload)
SM-04 kit still available (or give/astral again)
input: Recipe: alloys:astral_helmet
5× Astral Ingot (nether_star + alloys_material) in helmet layout
Table output: unfinished paper token first
expect: Named Astral Helmet with alloy data
Paper token cleared
mustNot: Named Astral Helmet missing while paper remains
Refund tellraw
Stuck unfinished paper

cases.title: Negative — plain nether_star helmet

expect: Paper token cleared
Nether stars refunded
Red tellraw notice
mustNot: Named Astral Helmet
Stuck unfinished paper

cases.title: Trait probe — Steel Resistance

Wait 5–8 seconds

Effect ends after unequip

cases.title: Plugin is convenience only

preconditions: World restarted after zip replace (not only /reload)

Without plugin: /function alloys:give/tin

Same craft exclusivity without plugin

cases.title: Token lifecycle — Bronze pickaxe
cases.objective: Confirm pending paper → resolve pipeline (all 110 gear recipes use this).
preconditions: World restarted after zip replace (not only /reload)
input: Recipe: alloys:bronze_pickaxe
3× Bronze Ingot + 2 sticks
Functions: recipes/craft/mark → recipes/craft/resolve (via dispatch, 1t)

Repeat with plain firework_rocket + sticks (no alloy ingots).

Fraud: paper gone; 3 rockets + 2 sticks refunded; red tellraw
mustNot: Stuck unfinished paper after resolve
Named Bronze Pickaxe from plain rockets

cases.objective: Named Tin pickaxe via validate → mark legit → resolve (1t).
preconditions: World restarted after zip replace (not only /reload)
input: Recipe id: alloys:tin_pickaxe
Ingot slots: Tin Ingot (carrier firework_star WITH alloys_material custom_data)
Other slots: sticks (vanilla tool layout)
Immediate table output: paper token "Tin pickaxe (unfinished)" (alloys_pending + alloys_material/alloys_gear)
steps: Place alloy kit ingredients for pickaxe.
Take the output (brief gray unfinished paper is OK for ≤1 tick).
expect: Named Tin pickaxe from loot table (full alloy components).
Unfinished paper token removed from inventory.
Item has alloy custom_data / enchant glint as designed.
No plain-craft refund tellraw.

Named Tin pickaxe missing while paper was cleared.
Refund of ingredients after a successful alloy craft.
